verb_to_be_future_theme.name: Verb to Be: Future (will be / won't be)

future_will_be_negative.name: Negative future: won't be / will not be

future_will_be_short_answer.name: Short answer: Yes, … will / No, … won't

there_will_be.name: There will be / There won't be

future_conditional_clause.name: If / Provided / Unless + present, … will be …

future_time_clause.name: When / Once / After + present, … will be …

future_certainty.name: Expressing certainty: I'm sure + will be

future_opinion.name: Asking opinion: Do you think + will be?

future_hope.name: Expressing hope: I hope + will be

future_belief.name: Expressing belief: We believe + will be

future_doubt.name: Expressing doubt: I doubt + will be

future_fear.name: Expressing fear: I'm afraid + won't be

future_concession.name: Concession: However / Even with + will be

future_hedging.name: Hedging: It remains to be seen + will be

future_likelihood.name: Likelihood: In all likelihood + will be

future_rhetorical.name: Rhetorical: It will be no exaggeration

future_would_be_reported.name: Reported speech: would be (future in the past)

future_inverted_negative.name: Inverted negative: Never / On no account / Not until + will + subject + be

future_inverted_so.name: Inverted: So + adjective + will + subject + be

saved_test.name: Verb to Be: Future — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for Verb to Be in future tense: will be affirmative, won't be negative, Will … be? questions, short answers, There will be, passive will be, conditional and time clauses, reported speech with would be, inverted negatives, and subjunctive be across A1–C2.
